flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Henry/Carroll are 21% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($29.1k vs $36.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Henry/Carroll rose 31% between 1999 and 2002 ($1.8k → $2.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Henry/Carroll vs the 2003–2007 baseline (67.1% vs 72.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Henry/Carroll rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 (73.8% → 84.9%).
